message:
fix(audit): prevent infinite recursion in redaction with circular refs

Fix potential stack overflow when redacting objects with circular
references by adding a WeakSet to track visited objects.

Changes:
- Add 'visited' WeakSet parameter to redact() method
- Return "[CIRCULAR]" placeholder for already-visited objects
- Pass visited set through recursive calls in arrays and objects
- Update containsSensitiveData() with same circular reference protection
- Update redactObject() signature to accept visited set

This prevents crashes when logging objects that reference themselves,
such as EventEmitters or complex graph structures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
